name: Caramel Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 6 slices Day-old bread, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bread in a greased 2-quart baking dish.
2. Combine water and brown sugar; pour over bread.
3. Combine remaining ingredients; pour over bread.
4. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
5. Serve warm or cold.
